case_title: MEISENHOELDER, DANIEL J. VS H.R. WELLINGTON CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEISENHOELDER, DANIEL J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT H.R. WELLINGTON CONSTRUCTION, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-06-2003, GRANTED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT H.R. WELLINGTON CONSTRUCTION, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MEISENHOELDER, DANIEL J. AS TO DEFENDANT H.R. WELLINGTON CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
FAXED CORRESPONDENCE FILD BY PLFT. RE: CON'T DUE TO ILLNESS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-18-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-08-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MATTER CONTINUED TO 9/8/03 @ 5:30 PM FOR TRIAL. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT H.R. WELLINGTON CONSTRUCTION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEISENHOELDER, DANIEL J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT H.R. WELLINGTON CONSTRUCTION, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
